items.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
items.title_zh: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Anthropic on Friday announced it's disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 artificial intelligence models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S.；government that cited "national security authorities." The company said it received an order at 5:21 p.m.；ET, instructing it to suspend all access to the models "by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States, including foreign national Anthropic employees." Anthropic abruptly disabled the models for all of its customers in order to ensure compliance, but said all of its other models will not be affected.
important_points: Anthropic on Friday announced it's disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 artificial intelligence models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S.
government that cited "national security authorities." The company said it received an order at 5:21 p.m.

ET, instructing it to suspend all access to the models "by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the United States, including foreign national Anthropic employees." Anthropic abruptly disabled the models for all of its customers in order to ensure compliance, but said all of its other models will not be affected.

items.summary: 市场对AI基础设施的需求持续增长，用户数量和任务复杂度上升，导致资源消耗速度超过供应增长。计算资源瓶颈使市场从补贴转向价格发现。转向正经济效益的路径非线性，主动管理策略可能更具优势。
important_points: 用户数量和任务复杂度不断上升
计算资源瓶颈加剧市场压力

items.title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
items.title_zh: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Consumer prices rose in May, pushing the annual inflation rate to its highest level in three years, according to new government data.；That points to a 4.7% Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027, according to a new estimate from Mary Johnson, an independent Social Security and Medicare policy analyst.；Last month, Johnson had forecast a 4.2% COLA for next year.
important_points: Consumer prices rose in May, pushing the annual inflation rate to its highest level in three years, according to new government data.
That points to a 4.7% Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027, according to a new estimate from Mary Johnson, an independent Social Security and Medicare policy analyst.
Last month, Johnson had forecast a 4.2% COLA for next year.

items.title: Trump name must be removed from Kennedy Center by Friday night as appeals court rejects delay

items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：President Donald Trump's name must come off the facade of the Kennedy Center in Washington by Friday night, as a federal appeals court rejected a last-minute bid to block a lower-court judge's order mandating the removal.；But the three-judge panel on the U.S.；Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit left open the possibility that Trump's name could be added back to the performing arts landmark if the Department of Justice is successful in its appeal of the lower-court judge's decision.
important_points: President Donald Trump's name must come off the facade of the Kennedy Center in Washington by Friday night, as a federal appeals court rejected a last-minute bid to block a lower-court judge's order mandating the removal.
But the three-judge panel on the U.S.

Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit left open the possibility that Trump's name could be added back to the performing arts landmark if the Department of Justice is successful in its appeal of the lower-court judge's decision.

items.title: Judge blocks DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund for longer, wants guarantee it’s dead
items.title_zh: Judge blocks DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund for longer, wants guarantee it’s dead
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：A federal judge in Alexandria, Virginia, on Friday extended her block against the Department of Justice implementing a "Anti-Weaponization Fund," saying that Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche's verbal claim that the fund was not going forward was an insufficient guarantee.；Judge Leonie Brinkema gave Blanche and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent a week to submit written sworn declarations that the fund was not going forward, as Blanche testified to a House panel on June 2, MS NOW reported.；Blanche, during that testimony, resisted requests from lawmakers that he put his claim in writing.
important_points: A federal judge in Alexandria, Virginia, on Friday extended her block against the Department of Justice implementing a "Anti-Weaponization Fund," saying that Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche's verbal claim that the fund was not going forward was an insufficient guarantee.

Judge Leonie Brinkema gave Blanche and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent a week to submit written sworn declarations that the fund was not going forward, as Blanche testified to a House panel on June 2, MS NOW reported.
Blanche, during that testimony, resisted requests from lawmakers that he put his claim in writing.

items.title: How to get SpaceX stock — without buying the IPO
items.title_zh: 如何通过IPO获取SpaceX股票
items.summary: 这篇文章分析了SpaceX首次公开募股的市场影响，指出IPO初期股价波动大，投资者需注意集中风险。数据显示，IPO后股价可能受波动影响，机构和基金可通过ETF等方式间接参与。其他IPO如Anthropic和OpenAI也提供类似投资渠道。投资者需关注公司估值与市场反应。
important_points: IPO初期股价波动较大，风险较高
投资者可通过ETF等间接方式参与
市场对SpaceX估值的高估引发关注
机构和基金提供多渠道投资选择

items.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
items.title_zh: 小投资者对SpaceXIPO的热情与质疑
items.summary: 市场反应强烈，投资者对SpaceX的IPO价格持怀疑态度。尽管估值高企，实际需求有限，但股价迅速上涨。机构和个人投资者对公司未来前景持分歧意见。
important_points: 投资者认为估值过高，价格合理性存疑。
SpaceX设定了135美元的固定价，开盘至高超越。
零售股占比低于预期，但比历史低，交易平台灵活。

items.title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
items.title_zh: 一位前特斯拉董事说，SpaceX需要实现三个‘火星探索’项目中的两项才能维持其估值
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Elon Musk's SpaceX will need to achieve at least two of its three "moonshots" to justify its huge valuation, a former Tesla board member told CNBC Friday.；Musk's reusable rocket company is looking to raise $75 billion, selling 555.6 million shares for $135 apiece, according to a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission.；The deal values SpaceX at $1.77 trillion, making it the seventh most-valuable U.S.
important_points: Elon Musk's SpaceX will need to achieve at least two of its three "moonshots" to justify its huge valuation, a former Tesla board member told CNBC Friday.
Musk's reusable rocket company is looking to raise $75 billion, selling 555.6 million shares for $135 apiece, according to a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission.
The deal values SpaceX at $1.77 trillion, making it the seventh most-valuable U.S.

items.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.title_zh: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Americans have more money invested for retirement in passive S&P 500 Index funds than any other investment.；The Vanguard and BlackRock S&P 500 ETFs alone manage nearly $2 trillion in assets, with the Vanguard ETF (VOO) recently passing the $1 trillion mark.；But unlike other mutual funds and ETFs, they won't be managing SpaceX shares any time soon for retail investors who want to get a piece of the action in the stock after Friday's mega-cap IPO, the biggest in the history of the market.
important_points: Americans have more money invested for retirement in passive S&P 500 Index funds than any other investment.
The Vanguard and BlackRock S&P 500 ETFs alone manage nearly $2 trillion in assets, with the Vanguard ETF (VOO) recently passing the $1 trillion mark.

But unlike other mutual funds and ETFs, they won't be managing SpaceX shares any time soon for retail investors who want to get a piece of the action in the stock after Friday's mega-cap IPO, the biggest in the history of the market.

items.title: For Warsh as Fed chair, silence may be the point
items.title_zh: Warsh担联邦储备委员会主席，沉默可能是关键
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Markets head into the first Fed meeting run by new Chair Kevin Warsh with almost no idea what he thinks about the recent surge in job growth, the acceleration in inflation or the path of interest rates.；And that may be by design.；Warsh has strongly criticized Fed communications, saying they have led to policy errors and placed the Fed more at the center of market decisions and the economy than it should be.
important_points: Markets head into the first Fed meeting run by new Chair Kevin Warsh with almost no idea what he thinks about the recent surge in job growth, the acceleration in inflation or the path of interest rates.
And that may be by design.
Warsh has strongly criticized Fed communications, saying they have led to policy errors and placed the Fed more at the center of market decisions and the economy than it should be.

items.title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors
items.title_zh: SpaceX的Gwynne Shotwell对IPO有疑虑，现在向投资者发出信息
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：SpaceX didn't just rewrite the playbook for aerospace and defense, it helped birth a new space economy.；Now Elon Musk's company is tackling a different type of moonshot: going public.；"I wasn't sure we would go public," SpaceX Chief Operating Officer Gwynne Shotwell told CNBC in an exclusive interview, just before the company started its investor roadshow.
important_points: SpaceX didn't just rewrite the playbook for aerospace and defense, it helped birth a new space economy.
Now Elon Musk's company is tackling a different type of moonshot: going public.
"I wasn't sure we would go public," SpaceX Chief Operating Officer Gwynne Shotwell told CNBC in an exclusive interview, just before the company started its investor roadshow.

items.title: 央行修订大额存单管理办法：个人认购门槛拟降至20万，新增DR定价基准
items.title_zh: 央行修订大额存单管理办法：门槛降至20万元
items.summary: 央行近期修订大额存单管理办法，降低个人购买门槛至20万元，扩大了参与范围。该调整反映了市场对流动性和低门槛的需求，同时明确了提前支取、转让等操作的规则。数据显示，过去十年大额存单制度已发生重大变化，新规将规范发行与交易。市场应关注政策利率与DR利率的联动，提升市场透明度。
important_points: 个人购买起点从30万元降至20万元。
明确第三方平台和银行可参与大额存单转让、提前支取。
强化信息披露和监督管理，确保市场透明。

items.title: 就在今晚！一文看懂SpaceX“史诗级”IPO
items.title_zh: 今晚就在！SpaceX IPO大揭秘
items.summary: SpaceX IPO预计将引发市场关注，发行价135美元，目标市值高达1.77万亿美元。机构参与者通过预售锁定交易，预计首单交易或等待开盘。IPO规则调整可能影响散户参与，市场对未来表现持谨慎看法。
important_points: 首单交易或需等待开盘时间。
机构通过预售锁定交易，影响流动性。
规则修改可能改变散户参与比例。
